title: OpenStax Introductory Statistics
description: A source card for the OpenStax Introductory Statistics textbook.

pages.text: OpenStax Introductory Statistics covers data collection, descriptive statistics, probability, distributions, confidence intervals, hypothesis tests, regression, and inference.
Use this source for older students evaluating graphs, claims, sampling, uncertainty, and data-centered nonfiction.
OpenStax books carry Creative Commons licenses. Check the linked book page for the exact license before mirroring chapters or figures.

usagePolicy.reason: This book may not be used in the training of large language models or otherwise be ingested into large language models or generative AI offerings without OpenStax's permission.

licenseAudit.note: OpenStax attribution, noncommercial, and share-alike requirements apply to adaptations. Generative-AI ingestion requires OpenStax permission.
